bullets: Indonesia proposed severe ADD on Vietnamese PP just as NSRP launches spot sales.
Lotte Hyundai yarn finalized a low 1,170 (some 1,160) CIF.
Asian PP diverges: China up, SEA down on sluggish trade.
Asian PE down 30-50 on weak seasonal demand and caution.
Lotte and Sabic cut finals (UL814 to 1,310; LDPE coating to 1,550).
Domestic fiercely competitive; merchants undercut LSP factory quotes.
China May PVC output -5.49% m/m on maintenance; slight price recovery.
Suppliers cut Chinese PVC to Vietnam up to 110 (LG/Hygain at 720 CIF).

editorial.changedNote: Several PP/PE items eased on competition

summary: Asian PE plummeted across segments (down 30-50) on weak seasonal demand and caution.
Lotte and Sabic cut finalized import prices to Vietnam to fight slow sales.
Domestic stayed fiercely competitive as merchants undercut factory quotes.
paras: Lotte LLDPE injection UL814 finalized at 1,310 CIF (90 below offer); HDPE yarn re-offered to 1,300 (finalized 1,270), blow 1,290; SK HDPE yarn 1,280. PTT HDPE yarn 1,340 (down 110), blow 1,400.
On June 4, Sabic finalized LDPE coating 1,630 / 1,550 (over 5 ctn, down 70); LLDPE Film 118NJ/218WJA/222WJ at 1,155 CIF HCMC (down 45-65) - slow sales.
ME supply rose: Borouge LDPE 1,530; Oman LLDPE 1,190-1,200; Basell US-made LDPE 1,530.

LSP held LLDPE Film 38,200, HDPE Film 41,200 South - high; merchants undercut. Domestic 7042 (Kunlun)/7050 34,400 (down 100-300); Baofeng coal-based 32,700; another 33,400; Sabic-China/Sabic 222WJ 36,500; ZPC 2426H 45,000 / 42,800.
Regional: NEA HDPE/yarn/inj/blow -50, LLDPE -35, LDPE -40; SEA HDPE -30 to 1,310-1,320, LLDPE -30 to 1,270, mC6 -30 to 1,420, LDPE -30 to 1,520. SEA operating ~70%.

summary: Indonesia proposed severe ADD on Vietnamese PP as NSRP launched new spot sales.
Lotte Hyundai captured share with a low finalized 1,170 (some 1,160) CIF.
Asian spot PP diverged: Chinese domestic rose while SEA kept falling.
paras: Indonesia KADI proposed ADD 5.52-36.62% on PP homo from 8 countries; Vietnam at 17.32%, Hyosung Vina 7.07%. NSRP readied a 15,000-ton 114G/105G spot sale (June 10-30) on high, slow-moving inventory.
On June 5, Lotte Hyundai PP yarn/injection finalized 1,170 CIF (some big buyers 1,160) - the cheapest, beating Chinese.
Chinese PP abundant but failed to attract: homo from 1,280, block copo from 1,380 (up); Jinneng HP550J/HP500N 1,175 FOB Qingdao, BOPP 1,185 (down 25).
Domestic: NSRP 114G lowest ~34,200 North; cheapest PP yarn was Chinese at 33,600. Hyosung yarn 36,300 (down 400); BSR T3034 35,800-36,000 HCMC; Lotte MP9600 49,000.
Per Platts, NEA PP flat; SEA yarn/injection -30 to 1,240, BOPP -20 to 1,270, IPP/block copo -30 to 1,290 (Vietnam 30-40 below).
Spot PP mixed: China up ~100 RMB in three days on feedstock; suppliers favored domestic over SEA exports amid competition and weak demand (Indonesia holidays).

summary: China PVC output fell on maintenance, lifting domestic prices slightly amid broader Asian weakness.
Suppliers cut Chinese PVC to Vietnam up to 110 (LG/Hygain at 720 CIF).
Buyer caution pushed Vietnamese sellers to undercut factory rates nationwide.
paras: China May PVC output 1.91M tons (-5.49% m/m, -4.43% y/y) on maintenance and ethylene-based capacity cuts; run rate fell to 68.27% (down 6.37 pt). Futures/spot recovered slightly in early June, but weak property demand and a rainy India capped gains.
On June 5, LG Chem TL-1000 and Hygain HS-1000R both at 720 CIF Hai Phong (EXW, 5% tax), down 70 and 110 vs mid-last-month. China oil-based cost ~700 CFR, so the offers were competitive.
In Vietnam, North Yihua/Xinfa SG-5 at 22,200 with transport (Yen Vien) - sideways. Southern Yihua SG-5 22,000; Chinese oil-based to 24,000.
Southern domestic/Thai SG660/SP660/PM66R finalized 24,000-24,500, below factory, on cautious sentiment.
Per Platts, China PVC -10 to 850 CFR, SEA -10 to 800. China oil-based -300 RMB; coal-based stable. Another index showed Asian PVC sideways (SEA 800-850).
